headline: McDonald's Plans New $3 Menu, in Latest Bid to Win Customers With Better Deals
summary: McDonald's is looking to launch a new $3 menu next month as part of the fast-food giant's focus on value, according to a report from The Wall Street Journal.

headline: McDonald’s to introduce lower-priced value menu, WSJ reports

headline: McDonald’s reportedly eyes $3 or less value platform
summary: The low-priced menu will include items like a four-piece Chicken McNuggets and a sausage biscuit when it launches in April, per The Wall Street Journal.

headline: McDonald’s McValue 2.0 Tests Value Appeal Against Rich Share Valuation
summary: McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) is rolling out a new McValue 2.0 discount menu starting in April. The offer includes items priced at US$3 and under and US$4 breakfast meal deals aimed at budget conscious diners. The company is repositioning its menu to address consumer price sensitivity and tougher fast food competition. Management and franchisees are aligned on the plan to reinforce McDonald's value focused brand image. For you as an investor, this move sits at the heart of what McDonald's does,...

headline: In Battle For America’s Cheapest Menu, McDonald’s Offers $3 Meals
summary: McDonald’s (NYSE MCD) will offer a $3 meal, according to an exclusive report in The Wall Street Journal. In 2024, McDonald’s started its discount program with a $5 meal. McDonald’s Chris Kempczinski recently said, “We absolutely are going to make sure that we are protecting our leadership position in value.” What is not clear is ...
